SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkResourceProcessor

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkResourceProcessor
public final class JkResourceProcessor extends Object
This processor basically copies some resource files to a target folder (generally the class folder). It can also proceed to token replacement, i.e, replacing strings between ${ and } by a specified values.
The processor is constructed from a JkPathTreeSet and for each of them, we can associate a token map for interpolation.

      public Charset getInterpolationCharset()
      Returns the charset used for interpolation

    • setInterpolationCharset

      public JkResourceProcessor setInterpolationCharset(Charset interpolationCharset)
      Set the charset used for interpolation. This charset is not used if no interpolation occurs.

    • generate

      public void generate(JkPathTreeSet resourceTrees, Path outputDir)
      Actually processes the resources, meaning copies the getResources to the specified output directory along replacing specified tokens.
